items.title: Theo James shares why he doesn't go into a project thinking about mass appeal
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>"The Monkey" star Theo James says his early career was "hampered" by choosing roles in bigger projects aimed at wide audiences.

items.title: Trump says Putin would accept European peacekeepers in Ukraine as part of deal to end war
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>President Donald Trump says Russian leader Vladimir Putin would accept European peacekeepers in Ukraine as part of a potential deal to end Russia’s war there. Trump spoke on the third anniversary of Russia’s invasion of Ukraine from the Oval Office. Read more: https://bit.ly/4bctjbW 

#trump #putin #ukraine #russia 
Photo credit: POOL AFP

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress

items.content:
<article>Griffin Dunne reflects on the golden days of indie filmmaking and the difficulties young directors face today. He stars in the new film "Ex-Husbands."
#griffindunne #indiefilm #shorts</article>

items.title: Hunter Schafer on speaking out about passport
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>On the Independent Spirit Awards red carpet, "Euphoria" star Hunter Schafer discussed why she chose to speak out on social media after a U.S. passport agency recently changed her gender marker to male. 
#hunterschafer  #passport #shorts</article>

items.title: What to know about Germany's election results
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Provisional results confirmed that the mainstream conservative party led by Friedrich Merz has won Germany’s national election.

AP's David Keyton explains what to know about his victory and how a strong showing from the far-right party could make forming a coalition difficult.

#shorts #friedrichmerz #germany #election</article>

items.title: 'Anora' team earns praise from sex worker community

items.content:
<article>At the Spirit Awards, "Anora" director Sean Baker and actor Mikey Madison share how feedback from the sex worker community has been the highlight of their film's success.
#anora #mikeymadison #seanbaker #shorts</article>

items.title: UN rejects US resolution urging an end to Ukraine war without noting Russian aggression
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>In a win for Ukraine on the third anniversary of Russia’s invasion, the United States on Monday failed to get the U.N. General Assembly to approve its resolution urging an end to the war without mentioning Moscow's aggression.

#ukraine #russia #news 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: LIVE: Trump and Macron hold a press conference at the White House
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>President Donald Trump and French President Emmanuel Macron hold a press conference at the White House.

Trump welcomes Macron to the White House for talks at a moment of deep uncertainty about the future of transatlantic relations, with Trump transforming American foreign policy and effectively tuning out European leadership as he looks to quickly end Russia’s war in Ukraine.

#trump #macron #live</article>

items.title: LIVE: Outside court in Washington for motion hearing after AP sues 3 Trump administration officials
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Live from the U.S. District Court in Washington ahead of a motion hearing after The Associated Press sued three Trump administration officials Friday over access to presidential events, citing freedom of speech in asking a federal judge to stop the blocking of its journalists.

The AP says its case is about an unconstitutional effort by the White House to control speech — in this case not changing its style from the Gulf of Mexico to the “Gulf of America,” as President Donald Trump did last month with an executive order.

The AP says it will retain the style of Gulf of Mexico because it serves a global audience, many of whom refer to the body of water that way. The news agency has said that its guidance was offered to promote clarity, and that journalists should also note Trump’s action to change the name.

#trump #donaldtrump #live</article>

items.title: LIVE: UN General Assembly holds special session on Ukraine
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>On the third anniversary of Russia’s invasion of Ukraine, the Eleventh Emergency Special Session of the General Assembly is expected to vote on competing resolutions—one backed by Europe and Ukraine demanding the immediate withdrawal of Russian forces, and another from the U.S. calling for a swift end to the war without mentioning Moscow's aggression. Read more: https://bit.ly/4kfWvTl

#unitednations #ukraine #news #live</article>
